spec.description:
Comprehensive dashboard for the OPNsense Prometheus Exporter covering all 300+ metrics.

https://github.com/rknightion/opnsense-exporter

spec.title: System Information
spec.description: System details from info metric labels

spec.title: Last Config Change
spec.description: Unix timestamp of last config change

spec.title: PF States Usage
spec.description: Current states as ratio of limit

spec.title: IPv4 Inbound Packets
spec.description: Inbound IPv4 packets (pass vs block) per interface

spec.title: Firewall Interface Hits
spec.description: Rate of firewall rule matches per interface

spec.title: Rule Evaluations Rate
spec.description: Top 10 rules by evaluation rate. Requires --exporter.enable-firewall-rules-details

spec.title: Probe Timings
spec.description: Gateway probe interval, period, and timeout

spec.title: Cache Entry Count
spec.description: Entries in rrset, message, infra, key caches

spec.title: TCP Usage Ratio
spec.description: TCP connection usage for DNS resolver

spec.title: WireGuard Last Handshake Age
spec.description: Seconds since last handshake per peer

spec.title: OpenVPN Instances
spec.description: OpenVPN instances with role, description labels

spec.title: ARP Table
spec.description: ARP entries showing IP, MAC, hostname, interface

spec.title: NDP Table (IPv6 Neighbors)
spec.description: NDP entries showing IP, MAC, interface

spec.title: TCP Connections by State
spec.description: Current TCP connection count by state

spec.title: CARP VIP Config
spec.description: CARP advertisement base and skew per VIP

spec.title: NTP Peer Info
spec.description: NTP peer details: server, refid, type, status

spec.title: Certificate Inventory
spec.description: All certificates with description, CN, type, in_use

spec.title: OPNSense Exporter
